name: causalontology
summary: The Python binding of the Causalontology standard - a verb-first noun-hosting ontology; a programming-language-neutral standard and shared commons for reified causation. Zero dependencies: RFC 8785 canonicalization, SHA-256 identity, pure-Python Ed25519 (RFC 8032), schema and semantics validation, and an in-memory conformant store.
license: The attribution always; no profit, no problem license. (Apache License 2.0 text)
